patch

sys/types.h is necessary for uint:
fparser/fparser.cc:3006:55: error: 'uint' was not declared in this scope; did you mean 'rint'?
 3006 | void FunctionParserBase<Value_t>::AllocateStackMemory(uint nbStack)
      |                                                       ^~~~
      |                                                       rint
